hero.name: Data Scientist
hero.title: Data Scientist & Analytics Expert
hero.description: Passionate about transforming data into actionable insights. Specializing in machine learning, statistical analysis, and data visualization to drive business decisions.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Passionate Data Scientist
about.description: I am a dedicated data scientist with expertise in Python, R, and SQL. My passion lies in uncovering patterns in complex datasets and building predictive models that drive business value. With experience in machine learning, statistical analysis, and data visualization, I help organizations make data-driven decisions.

positions.title: Senior Data Scientist
positions.description: Leading data science initiatives and developing machine learning models for business optimization.
achievements: Developed predictive models improving forecast accuracy by 25%
Led cross-functional team of 5 data analysts
Implemented automated reporting reducing manual work by 60%

positions.title: Data Analyst
positions.description: Analyzed complex datasets and created visualizations for executive decision-making.
achievements: Built interactive dashboards using Power BI and Tableau
Conducted statistical analysis for A/B testing campaigns
Improved data quality processes reducing errors by 40%

items.title: Customer Segmentation Analysis
items.description: Machine learning model to segment customers based on behavior patterns using clustering algorithms.

items.title: Sales Forecasting Dashboard
items.description: Interactive dashboard for sales prediction using time series analysis and statistical modeling.

items.title: Sentiment Analysis Tool
items.description: NLP application to analyze customer sentiment from social media and reviews data.
